title: palicourea oblonga
intro: Palicourea oblonga, also known as Iresine or Kola nut, is a tropical plant native to the Caribbean region, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The leaves of Palicourea oblonga have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Palicourea oblonga include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
